plan.caption:
Mewtwo Star from EX Holon Phantoms is worth $7,100. For one card.

It is one of the rarest pulls in the set, and the artwork is why collectors chase it.

Would you keep it or sell it? Tell us below.

pokeev.com runs the live Expected Value on every set, so you know exactly what your pulls are worth.
link in bio -> pokeev.com

vision.subject: Mewtwo Star floating in a star-filled cosmic void, arms outstretched
vision.sceneBody: Mewtwo hovers against a deep-space backdrop scattered with colored light bursts. | Masakazu Fukuda's composition places the subject dead center, arms wide, radiating authority.
vision.craftBody: A cluster of vivid red, blue, and gold light flares punctuates the upper-left void. | The holofoil layer beneath amplifies each burst, making the starfield shift with every tilt.
